_meta.description: This file contains testimonials from real clients who have worked with the portfolio owner on a freelance basis. Each entry includes the client's name, their business name, a quote, an optional avatar image, the date, and a reference to the associated project. This data powers the Testimonials section visible in freelance mode only. The section is hidden in the UI until at least one testimonial has a non-empty quote field.

fields.name: Full name of the client providing the testimonial.
fields.designation: Role or designation of the client within the business providing the testimonial.
fields.business: Name of the client's business or organisation.
fields.quote: The testimonial text in the client's own words.
fields.date: Approximate date the testimonial was given (e.g. March 2025).
fields.project_ref: Name of the project this testimonial relates to, matching the name field in freelance_projects_data.json.

testimonials.name: Tanu
testimonials.quote: Waiting for her testimonial. Waiting for her testimonial. Waiting for her testimonial. Waiting for her testimonial. Waiting for her testimonial. Waiting for her testimonial. Waiting for her testimonial.
